subject: [PATCH v4 07/11] mm: handle PMD swap entries in MADV_WILLNEED

2026-07-13.patch_summary: This patch enhances the handling of PMD swap entries in MADV_WILLNEED operations. It addresses a limitation where MADV_WILLNEED was ineffective on PMD swap entries due to the way they are handled by the swapin_walk_pmd_entry function. The patch introduces new logic to handle PMD swap entries under pmd_trans_huge_lock, including splitting them if necessary and retrying through the PTE path in case of a race condition. This ensures that PMD swap entries can be properly prefetched and faulted on demand.
